steps.t: Chief Tuokki is at the Earth-kin village of Lehmä-koti, in the Ram Dúath, south of Angmar.
Aarnikka and Santtu can be found in the village of Lehmä-koti and may know something about the corrupted pouch.
There is a pond in the North Downs, in the south-east corner of Nan Amlug East, where the Rauta-lehmä gather. Santtu told you Trotsiv was going to go …
You have found an Ent near a pond in the North Downs.
Elrond is at the Haven of Orladion in Rivendell, north-west of the Last Homely House. You have cleansed the corruption from the Seeds of Defiance, and…
